spec.expr: 100 * sum by (provider) (rate(bank_request_duration_ms_count{currency=~"$currency", provider=~"$provider", outcome="success"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (provider) (rate(bank_request_duration_ms_count{currency=~"$currency", provider=~"$provider"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)
